disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe bursting headache of 6 hours, unremitting and progressively worsening
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the headache?
When did it start and how bad is it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about 6 hours ago and it's the worst headache of my life — like my head is going to burst. It hasn't let up at all and it's getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Home blood pressure machine repeatedly reading above 210/120 mmHg
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to check your blood pressure at home?
What numbers is your machine showing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My home machine keeps showing over 210 on top and about 120 on the bottom — I've checked it several times.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral visual disturbance — large blind spots (scotomata) in both eyes
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are big blurry grey blind spots all over my vision, in both eyes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Carer-reported new confusion, lethargy and repetitive questioning developing over 2 hours (altered mental status)
trigger_question_examples: Is he thinking and speaking normally?
Has his alertness or behaviour changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: (Spouse) Over the last couple of hours he's become really drowsy and muddled — he keeps asking me the same questions over and over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stopped regular antihypertensive medications (perindopril and amlodipine) two weeks ago because he felt well
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medications?
Have you missed or stopped any of your usual tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm supposed to take blood pressure tablets — perindopril and amlodipine — but I stopped both about two weeks ago because I felt perfectly fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild shortness of breath and one episode of vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Any other symptoms — breathing, nausea, vomiting?
How is your breathing, and have you felt sick or been sick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit short of breath and I threw up once a little while ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Headache built up gradually over 6 hours rather than being an instantaneous maximal-onset (thunderclap) headache
trigger_question_examples: Did the headache come on all at once at full force, or build up over time?
Was it instant and maximal from the very first second, or did it get worse gradually?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It built up over a few hours and kept getting worse — it wasn't like being hit instantly at full strength.
